ValidationRule.description: Display & Mandatory only if FATCAClassification = "Reporting Model 1 FFI"
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPTax , RecordType.DeveloperName = 'SetUp', ISPICKVAL(FATCAClassification__c, 'Reporting Model 1 FFI'), ISBLANK(GIINSponsorCode__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If FATCAClassification = "Reporting Model 1 FFI", please provide a value for GIIN Sponsor Code.
